content.text:
<user_query>
Audit yesterday's attached/related agent transcripts for this BIQc repo and produce a detailed change log focused on website-diagram and calibration-related deployment history.

Scope:
- Transcript directory: C:/Users/andre/.cursor/projects/c-Users-andre-cursor-worktrees-Version2-Ai-Mentor-tpn/agent-transcripts
- Prioritize chats from yesterday and those visible in user screenshot list (e.g., Website diagram enhancement for BIQc, BIQc hero section automation and benefits, CMO report chats, edge function review chats).

Tasks:
1) Identify relevant transcript UUIDs/titles from yesterday.
2) Extract all stated deployments (prod/main/dev) and what was deployed (frontend image tags, backend image tags, supabase functions, branches/commits).
3) Reconstruct a detailed bullet list of user-visible changes and their intended effect.
4) Call out conflicts/overwrites/rollbacks in sequence where one deployment replaced another.
5) Provide a concise "ground truth timeline" with timestamps/order.

Output format required:
- Relevant chats list (title + uuid)
- Timeline of deploy/actions (ordered)
- Detailed change inventory (bulleted, grouped by Website/UI, Auth/Token, Calibration/Edge functions)
- What is currently believed deployed to prod and dev (based on transcript evidence)
- Uncertainties/gaps explicitly listed.
</user_query>
Auditing agent transcripts for Mar 29, 2026 (yesterday relative to Mar 30, 2026). Listing transcripts and searching for relevant content.
